results.title: Prince Harry's relationship with beloved uncle takes surprise turn
results.description: Even though Prince Harry had a tumultuous relationship with the royal family, the Spencer family continued to be supportive of the Duke of Sussex, especially Earl Charles Spencer. Harry’s uncle had been a key player in holding him back from making some of the biggest decisions...

results.title: Putin’s Visit to China: Xi Jinping Says All Hostilities in the Middle East Must End Immediately
results.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping said that the Gulf region in the Middle East is at a critical juncture between war and peace, and that all hostilities must end immediately. Xinhua reported on Wednesday, May 20, that Xi Jinping made the remarks during a meeting with Russian President Vladimir Putin. results.title: President Murmu Felicitates NE Artisans Including Tripura’s Samir Jamatia
results.description: President Droupadi Murmu felicitated artisans and weavers from the North Eastern states, including Tripura’s noted bamboo artisan Samir Jamatia, at Rashtrapati Bhavan for their contribution to the “Republic Day at Home 2026” celebrations and promotion of indigenous craftsmanship. Quick Glance President Droupadi Murmu met artisans and weavers from North East India at Rashtrapati Bhavan. results.title: IN DATA: One in ten people in Denmark does not have Danish citizenship
results.description: In the past 30 years, the percentage of the Danish population who do not hold Danish citizenship has tripled, according to new figures from the Rockwool Foundation.

results.title: Bengaluru civic body polls: Supreme Court extends GBA elections deadline till August 31
results.description: The SEC stated that the extension is necessary due to the overlapping timelines of the Census and the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls.
